title: CellChanged Event
description: Occurs when you leave a cell that has been changed.
notes: The CellChanged event is used to respond to when the user leaves a cell that has been modified. You can use the Sender$ parameter to determine which control sent the event, the CellText$ parameter to see what the value the cell now has, and the RowNumber and ColumnNumber parameters to determine which cell triggered the event. This is useful when you want to see when specific cells are changed or whenever any cell is changed.
examples: Function frmMain_Grid1_CellChanged(Sender$ As String, CellText$ As String, RowNumber As Integer, ColumnNumber As Integer)
